title: Section 13
content: (1) Meetings of the Central Board shall be conveyed by the Governor at least six times in each year and at least once in each quarter. (2) Any 1[four Directors] may require the Governor to convene a meeting of the Central Board at any time and the Governor shall forthwith convene a meeting accordingly. (3) The Governor, or 2[if for any reason, he is unable to attend,] the Deputy Governor authorised by the Governor under the proviso to sub-section (3) of section 8 to vote for him shall preside at meetings of the Central Board, and, in the event of an equality of votes, shall have a second or casting vote.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 18 of 1964, s. 38 and the Second Schedule, for "three Directors" (w.e.f. 1-7-1964). 2. Subs. by Act 24 of 1955, s. 5, for "in his absence" (w.e.f. 8-5-1955).
